title: Scallop Pasta with Smoky Peruvian Sauce
description: A fusion dish that combines the flavors of Peru with the freshness of scallops. This dish is a quick and easy meal that's perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Cook the pasta according to the package instructions until al dente. Drain and set aside.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the scallops to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes per side until cooked through.
Add the smoky peruvian sauce to the skillet and stir to combine. Bring the sauce to a simmer and cook for 1-2 minutes until heated through.
Add the cooked pasta to the skillet and toss to combine with the sauce and scallops.
Stir in the chopped cilantro and lime juice. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the pasta hot, topped with additional cilantro if desired.
